## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet test` passes
- [ ] The app builds (`dotnet build src/SemanticPortrait.App/... -f net10.0-windows10.0.19041.0`)
- [ ] No secrets, databases, models, or personal data in the diff (fixtures are fictional)
- [ ] Behavior verified by running it, not just by reading the code
